steps: Handle pong responses to confirm connection health
Reconnect if pong is not received within timeout
Configure server to respond to ping frames

rootCauseAnalysis.likelyRootCause: WebSocket keepalive timeout or server-side connection timeout
rootCauseAnalysis.technicalExplanation:
The 30-second pattern strongly suggests a timeout mechanism. This could be:
1. WebSocket keepalive timeout (common default is 30s)
2. Load balancer timeout
3. Server-side connection cleanup
4. Network infrastructure timeout
rootCauseAnalysis.recommendedFix: Implement client-side keepalive pings every 15-20 seconds
